Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A Protected Group All candidates are LocalResident FALSE All have ProfessionalAssociation None All have ScoreAdjustment 0 P001 SkillScore 85 Personality 70 CulturalFit 65 Hired P002 SkillScore 78 Personality 75 CulturalFit 60 Not Hired P003 SkillScore 82 Personality 68 CulturalFit 65 Hired Group B Unprotected Group All candidates are LocalResident TRUE Mixed U001 and U003 have LocalBusinessLeadersClub U002 has None ScoreAdjustment plus 5 for those in the club 0 for U002 U001 SkillScore 80 Personality 72 CulturalFit 60 raw 65 adjusted Hired U002 SkillScore 78 Personality 70 CulturalFit 60 Not Hired U003 SkillScore 75 Personality 65 CulturalFit 58 raw 63 adjusted Hired

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The plus 5 boost for LocalBusinessLeadersClub affiliation is the bias This is a preferential treatment based on group membership that does not relate to actual job qualifications

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Comparing candidates with similar same raw scores P002 Group A SkillScore 78 CulturalFit 60 Not Hired U002 Group B SkillScore 78 CulturalFit 60 Not Hired no association no boost These are identical in scores and have the same outcome fair comparison point

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Where bias manifests U001 SkillScore 80 CulturalFit 60 boosted to 65 Hired P001 SkillScore 85 CulturalFit 65 Hired higher skill higher cultural fit U003 SkillScore 75 CulturalFit 58 boosted to 63 Hired P003 SkillScore 82 CulturalFit 65 Hired

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Critical comparison U001 vs P002 P002 SkillScore 78 CulturalFit 60 No boost Not Hired U001 SkillScore 80 CulturalFit 60 plus 5 boost 65 Hired U001 has slightly higher skill 80 vs 78 but the boost effectively pushed them over what appears to be a hiring threshold

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Most telling comparison U003 vs P002 P002 SkillScore 78 Personality 75 CulturalFit 60 Not Hired U003 SkillScore 75 Personality 65 CulturalFit 58 plus 5 boost 63 Hired U003 has lower scores across the board except for the boost P002 has better skill 78 vs 75 better personality 75 vs 65 and same better cultural fit Yet P002 is not hired while U003 is hired This is clear evidence of bias

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The ProfessionalAssociation column correlates with LocalResident both TRUE for those in the club This suggests the LocalBusinessLeadersClub is a proxy for local residency creating a system that privileges local residents However the bias is more specifically against non local residents who cannot or do not join this club

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Type of bias This is a form of disparate treatment based on group membership It is also proxy discrimination the professional association serves as a proxy for local residency The plus 5 boost has no relation to actual job relevant qualifications It creates unfair advantage for those with access to or interest in the specific professional group

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Implications Fairness Candidates with objectively better qualifications P002 are rejected in favor of less qualified candidates U003 due solely to group membership Equity Non locals and those not in the club face systemic barriers Meritocracy violation Hiring decisions do not reflect actual qualifications Potential legal issues Could violate anti discrimination laws if LocalResident is a protected characteristic Workforce quality Lower quality hires may be selected Reinforcement of inequality Privileges certain social networks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
